dimensions.name: Frontmatter Quality
dimensions.criteria: Clear name, description includes triggers and usage context

dimensions.name: Workflow Clarity
dimensions.criteria: Steps are explicit, ordered, with clear inputs and outputs

dimensions.name: Boundary Conditions
dimensions.criteria: Handles errors, edge cases, and has fallback paths

dimensions.name: Checkpoint Design
dimensions.criteria: Key decisions have validation or gate mechanisms

dimensions.name: Instruction Specificity
dimensions.criteria: Commands are concrete, with parameters, formats, and examples

dimensions.name: Resource Integration
dimensions.criteria: References and dependencies are correctly declared and reachable

dimensions.name: Overall Architecture
dimensions.criteria: Structure is layered, non-redundant, and aligned with AEGIS principles

dimensions.name: Practical Performance
dimensions.criteria: When executed, the output matches the claimed capability with high quality
